channel.title: Sanjivani Pawar on INNOVATION | TechGeeks
channel.description: Recent content in Sanjivani Pawar on INNOVATION | TechGeeks

item.title: 🎉 Inauguration Day: A New Beginning for Tech Geeks - SIC! 🚀
item.description: On a bright and bustling morning, the campus of Maratha Mandal Engineering College buzzed with anticipation as students, faculty, and guests gathered to witness a momentous occasion – the inauguration of Tech Geeks - Student Innovation Club (SIC). 🎈
